latest_evidence_summary: OpenNori now directs visible interface goals through UI/UX acceptance discovery as packaged Skill behavior rather than CLI subjective validation. The root nori Skill routes missing UI/UX AC and interface-only functional AC back to nori-acceptance; nori-acceptance requires agent/user discovery for interface entry, navigation, hierarchy, states, feedback, readability, consistency, recovery, and UI boundaries; nori-autogoal includes the same UX acceptance dimensions when deriving a standard Nori Contract Draft from a rough interface idea. README, AGENTS, protocol, self contract, and the website explain the behavior, and objective tests verify the packaged Skill assets and AC-O-11 without encoding a UI-quality word list.
